name: Battle Sharks 2
objective: Survive as long as possible while shooting enemy sharks to maximize your score.
controls: WASD or Arrow Keys to move. Space to shoot. Avoid enemy sharks and bullets.
win_condition: Achieve the highest score you can before dying. Highscores are persisted.
avoid: Colliding with enemy sharks. Getting hit by projectiles.
tips: The play button is usually in the center of the menu screen. During gameplay, keep moving and shoot frequently. When game_over screen appears, look for a Restart or Play Again button.
